name: Seek & Find VR- Hidden Objects Adventure

reviews.review_description: Really fun game! I enjoyed looking around and finding all the hidden items Super cool in VR! It’s easy to play, relaxing, and keeps you curious. Had a great time exploring 🤩
Ive tried several times but unable to pick up the Book, rendering me unable to complete the first puzzle and unlock the next.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! 👋
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’ve recently released an update that adds new features, smoother gameplay, and helpful indicators to guide object selection. It seems you may have been trying to grab the wrong book, the correct one is on the kitchen table. Please try the latest version, and we hope it enhances your experience.
If you have any further questions, feel free to reach us at rebelsgamestudio@gmail.com
